pi_items.source: Geographic distribution of sample stations (CA, WA, CO, AZ)

privileged_info_summary: The dataset contains 25 weather stations sourced from the NOAA Global Historical Climatology Network - Daily (GHCN-Daily). These stations are located in the Western United States (including California, Washington, Colorado, and Arizona). Verified stations in the dataset include major airports such as Los Angeles International Airport (USW00023174), San Francisco International Airport (USW00023234), Seattle-Tacoma Airport (USW00024233), Denver International Airport (USW00003017), and Phoenix Sky Harbor International Airport (USW00023183).
